allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Python-first SCRPA transformation with data dictionary clarifications

- Add scrpa_transform.py: Core transformation engine matching All_Crimes.m
- Add generate_documentation.py: Documentation generator
- Add prepare_7day_outputs.py: 7-day filtering script
- Add run_scrpa_pipeline.py: Orchestration pipeline
- Add validate_parity.py: Validation against M code reference
- Add All_Crimes_Simple.m: Simplified M code for CSV import only

Key fixes from CLAUDE_CODE_FOLLOWUP_SCRPA_EDITS.md:
- Time columns: Export as HH:mm:ss \(no "0 days" prefix\)
- Zone: Coerce to integer \(whole number, no decimals\)
- Category_Type/Response_Type: Lookup from CallType_Categories.csv
- BiWeekly_Report_Name: Add column from cycle calendar
- Period: Clarify 7-Day uses calendar window, not "today minus 7"
- cycle_name: Document "Historical" when outside all 7-day windows
- BestTimeValue: Document cascade \(Incident Time → Between → Report Time\)
- Encoding: Support cp1252 for Windows RMS exports

Documentation updates:
- data_dictionary.yaml/json: Field clarifications
- PROJECT_SUMMARY.yaml/json: System overview
- claude.md: AI specification
- scripts/README.md: Quick start guide

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
